news.t: Best Healthcare ETFs To Buy Now
Add Up The Pieces: The First Trust Health Care AlphaDEX Fund ETF Could Be Worth $85
Implied First Trust Health Care AlphaDEX Fund ETF Analyst Target Price: $85

holdings.infoBox: FXH is an equity ETF with a total of 77 individual holdings. The top holdings are Humana stock at 4.64%, Organon & Co. at 3.80%, Elevance Health at 2.90%, DaVita at 2.89%, and Exelixis at 2.61%.

overview.description: The First Trust Health Care AlphaDEX Fund (FXH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the StrataQuant Health Care index. The fund tracks a tiered, equal-weighted index of large- and mid-cap US health care companies. Holdings are selected and weighted based on various growth and value criteria. FXH was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Best Healthcare ETFs To Buy Now
data.text: The best healthcare ETFs patch investors into an area of the market that offers both defensive properties and long-term growth.
